section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

Stamps (top right): "HAND DELIVERED" | "Name: Rohit Khanna    Page 1 of 6" | "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER / 17 OCT 10 AM 11:54 / OFFICE OF THE CLERK / U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES" | handwritten initials | "(For Official Use Only)"

- NAME: Rohit Khanna
- OFFICE TELEPHONE: (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ] / No [X]
- Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]; Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Transaction grid: greyed example row (JT, Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock, Sale X, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B $15,001-$50,000) — ignored per spec. The only filled entry in the grid reads "Please see the attached" (handwritten/typed across the FULL ASSET NAME column); all remaining rows blank.
